intents: find nearby providers for {service}
search {service} providers near my location
get {service} providers close to me
locate {service} providers in my area
who offers {service} nearby

args.name: address
args.value: current_location

args.name: sql
args.value: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.photo_url, u.bio, u.location_lat, u.location_lon, us.rate_amount FROM users u JOIN user_services us ON u.id = us.user_id JOIN service_categories sc ON us.service_id = sc.id WHERE sc.name_en = $1 AND u.role IN ('provider', 'both') AND earth_distance(ll_to_earth(u.location_lat, u.location_lon), ll_to_earth($2, $3)) <= 25000 ORDER BY earth_distance(ll_to_earth(u.location_lat, u.location_lon), ll_to_earth($2, $3)) ASC

args.value: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.bio, u.location_lat, u.location_lon FROM users u WHERE u.role IN ('provider', 'both') AND earth_distance(ll_to_earth(u.location_lat, u.location_lon), ll_to_earth($1, $2)) <= $3 * 1000
